1.title: CallCount Sum (by Class and Resource and Type)
1.query:
timeseries call_count_sum_by_class_resource_type = avg(cloud.aws.usage.call_count_sum_by_class_resource_type),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(call_count_sum_by_class_resource_type) desc
| limit 20

2.title: ResourceCount Average (by Class and Resource and Type)
2.query:
timeseries resource_count_average_by_class_resource_type = avg(cloud.aws.usage.resource_count_average_by_class_resource_type),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(resource_count_average_by_class_resource_type) desc
| limit 20
